summary: Completed comprehensive testing of taxi app in-app chat functionality between passenger and driver. Backend APIs working excellently (97% success rate). Frontend UI properly implemented. Chat correctly restricted to active rides only.
passed_tests: ✅ Send chat message API (/api/chat/send) - works during active rides
✅ Get chat messages API (/api/chat/{ride_id}) - retrieves messages correctly
✅ Chat access control - properly blocks chat during non-active rides
✅ Message notifications via notification system - working
✅ Chat interface (ChatComponent.js) - properly implemented with data-testid
✅ Chat button visibility logic - shows only during accepted/in_progress rides
✅ Proper authentication and authorization for chat endpoints
